bull.thesis: Azure re-accelerates to 40%+ as AI capacity comes online. Copilot ARR reaches $30B+ by FY2028. CapEx peaks in FY2026 and FCF recovery begins, driving multiple expansion to 35x+ P/E.

base.thesis: Azure grows 24-27% through FY2028. M365 Copilot adoption at 50-100% annual seat growth but below bull expectations. Operating margins stable at 47-49%. CapEx normalizes by FY2028 but FCF margin remains compressed.

bear.thesis: AI CapEx ROI fails to materialize within 3 years. Azure decelerates to 15-20% on enterprise spending cuts and competitive pressure from AWS/GCP. OpenAI partnership disruption. Antitrust remedies restrict bundling. Multiple compresses to 20x P/E on deceleration narrative.
